title: ajuga oblongata
intro: Ajuga oblongata, also known as bugleweed or Ajuga, is a perennial plant native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ajuga oblongata include reducing anxiety and insomnia due to its adaptogenic properties, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Ajuga oblongata is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
